professionalBio: Dynamic content creator specializing in fitness and lifestyle content. With 75K+ combined followers across Instagram and TikTok, I deliver authentic engagement through workout tutorials, healthy recipes, and motivational content.
audienceSummary: Primary audience: 18-34 year old fitness enthusiasts (65% female). High engagement from US and Canada. Content resonates most with gym-goers and home workout communities.
pitchEmail:
Subject: Collaboration Opportunity - Fitness Content Partnership
